mundane.name: Tarnished copper bracelet
mundane.description: A thin band of hammered copper, green with age. Worth melting down.

mundane.name: Cracked leather satchel
mundane.description: Sun-faded and split at the seams, but the buckle is still good.

mundane.name: Rusted belt knife
mundane.description: A short blade pitted with rust. Holds an edge, barely.

mundane.name: Dried rations bundle
mundane.description: Hard bread and salt meat wrapped in waxed cloth. Smells of the road.

mundane.name: Worn iron flask
mundane.description: A dented field flask. Whatever was in it is long gone.

mundane.name: Chipped wooden bowl
mundane.description: A camp bowl carved from dark wood, worn smooth by decades of use.

mundane.name: Tallow candle stub
mundane.description: Half a candle, still usable. Smells of rendered fat.

mundane.name: Leather coin purse
mundane.description: Empty. The drawstring is frayed but holds.

mundane.name: Crude iron ring
mundane.description: A plain band stamped with a maker's mark no one recognises.

mundane.name: Notched hunting knife
mundane.description: The blade is chipped near the tip from cutting through bone.

mundane.name: Vial of lamp oil
mundane.description: A small clay vial, sealed with wax. Burns clean for three hours.

mundane.name: Coarse wool blanket
mundane.description: Smells of smoke and travel. It has kept someone alive through cold nights.

mundane.name: Bent iron spike
mundane.description: A piton, bent from being hammered too hard. Still functional as a wedge.

mundane.name: Patch of cured hide
mundane.description: A hand-sized scrap of boar leather, cured stiff. Could patch a boot.

mundane.name: Stub of charcoal
mundane.description: Used for marking trail signs. A few marks left in it.

mundane.name: Iron arrowheads (bundle of 5)
mundane.description: Crudely knapped but serviceable. Good for hunting small game.

mundane.name: Tin of bitter salve
mundane.description: A small tin of foul-smelling herb paste. Applied to wounds, it keeps rot away.

mundane.name: Frayed rope coil
mundane.description: Fifteen feet of hempen rope, worn thin in the middle.

mundane.name: Cracked clay pipe
mundane.description: The bowl is hairline-cracked but still draws. Smells of old pipeweed.

mundane.name: Charcoal-wrapped dried mushrooms
mundane.description: A handful of preserved mushrooms tied in a cloth. Likely edible.

mundane.name: Folded scrap parchment
mundane.description: Blank on one side, a smudged list of numbers on the other.

mundane.name: Cracked hourglass
mundane.description: The lower chamber has a hairline fracture. Sand leaks slowly from one corner.

mundane.name: Pair of bone dice
mundane.description: Hand-carved and slightly uneven. Weighted by years of use, not craft.

mundane.name: Gnawed wax seal stamp
mundane.description: The crest is worn away to an unrecognisable smear.

mundane.name: Small tin of boot black
mundane.description: Half-used. Still soft. Someone cared about their footwear.

uncommon.name: Glowstone Pendant
uncommon.description: A pale opal set in iron wire that emits a faint, steady light in darkness.

uncommon.name: Flask of Everburn Oil
uncommon.description: A brass flask whose contents ignite on contact with air but never fully empty.

uncommon.name: Thornweave Gloves
uncommon.description: Thin leather gloves stitched with iron wire. The wearer can grip any surface, wet or dry.

uncommon.name: Resonance Stone
uncommon.description: A flat grey river stone that hums softly when another creature is within thirty feet.

uncommon.name: Smoked Glass Lens
uncommon.description: A small circular lens ground from dark glass. Looking through it reveals heat as a dull red glow.

uncommon.name: Whisper Wax Earplugs
uncommon.description: Small plugs of milky wax that dampen all sound. The wearer becomes immune to loud noise.

uncommon.name: Healer's Compressed Poultice
uncommon.description: A tightly wrapped bandage soaked in alchemical brine. Stabilises a dying creature instantly.

uncommon.name: Cartographer's Compass
uncommon.description: A brass compass that, once calibrated to a destination, points true regardless of obstacles.

uncommon.name: Shadowstep Slippers
uncommon.description: Soft-soled shoes woven with grey silk. The wearer makes no sound while walking.

uncommon.name: Ironwood Shield Fragment
uncommon.description: A small round buckler carved from a single ironwood knot. It turns aside blades without a mark.

uncommon.name: Venom Extractor Kit
uncommon.description: A set of glass vials and a hollow needle for drawing poison from wounds or harvesting it from creatures.

uncommon.name: Sealing Salt Pouch
uncommon.description: A leather pouch of coarse grey salt that, when poured across a threshold, prevents undead from crossing.

uncommon.name: Iron Bloodhound Tag
uncommon.description: A small stamped disc that, when pressed to a blood trail, leads the bearer toward its source for an hour.

uncommon.name: Condensed Smoke Vial
uncommon.description: A sealed glass vial of black smoke. Shattering it fills the area with a ten-foot cloud of dense grey fog.

uncommon.name: Featherweight Chalk
uncommon.description: A stick of chalk that marks surfaces invisible to the naked eye but obvious to the person who made them.

rare.name: Blade of Bitter Resolve
rare.description: A single-edged sword whose blade darkens when drawn in anger.

rare.name: Ashwalker Boots
rare.description: Black leather boots that leave no tracks and allow the wearer to cross hot coals without harm.

rare.name: Warden's Eye
rare.description: A small carved eye of polished obsidian. Once placed, it transmits everything it sees to the holder.

rare.name: Stormcaller Javelin
rare.description: A javelin wrapped in copper wire. It crackles when thrown, trailing sparks.

rare.name: Cloak of Diminished Silhouette
rare.description: A grey-green cloak that flattens the wearer's shape, making them harder to perceive at distance.

rare.name: Shard of the Shattered Bell
rare.description: A curved sliver of cracked iron from a legendary bell. When struck, it emits a tone that stuns creatures of fey origin.

rare.name: Flask of Drowned Embers
rare.description: A sealed iron flask containing liquid fire. Poured on a surface, it burns at freezing temperatures.

rare.name: Bonecage Helm
rare.description: A helm fashioned from layered bone shards and black iron. The wearer cannot be surprised.

rare.name: Dirge Dagger
rare.description: A narrow black-iron blade that whispers when drawn. Strikes cause targets to lose concentration.

rare.name: Mossgrown Amulet
rare.description: An amulet of living moss and iron wire. The wearer regenerates 1 HP per minute when resting outdoors.

very_rare.name: Voidclasp Gauntlet
very_rare.description: Black iron gauntlet that absorbs ambient light. Strikes leave trails of shadow.

very_rare.name: Greatsword of the Sunken Keep
very_rare.description: A two-handed blade recovered from beneath a drowned fortress. It hums with suppressed violence.

very_rare.name: Shroud of Still Water
very_rare.description: A cloak woven from waterlogged thread. The wearer cannot drown and moves freely in any liquid.

very_rare.name: Eye of Binding Sight
very_rare.description: A glass orb that, when gazed into, shows the last moments of any creature whose blood has touched it.

very_rare.name: Veilbreaker Crossbow
very_rare.description: A compact repeating crossbow whose bolts ignore mundane concealment and soft cover.

very_rare.name: Tomb Warden's Cuirass
very_rare.description: A breastplate carved with runes of warding. The wearer cannot be flanked or attacked by opportunity.

very_rare.name: Whisper Chain
very_rare.description: A fine silver chain that, worn around the throat, lets the wearer project their voice as a whisper to any one known person within a mile.

very_rare.name: Soulbrand Brand
very_rare.description: A short iron rod that, pressed to flesh, marks the target with a sigil visible only to the brander.

legendary.name: The Hollow Crown
legendary.description: A circlet of bone-white metal. The wearer hears whispers of every monarch who wore it before.

legendary.name: Gravewalker's Mantle
legendary.description: A tattered black mantle sewn from burial shrouds. The wearer is invisible to undead and can pass through solid stone once per day.

legendary.name: Edgebreaker
legendary.description: A massive black axe whose blade shatters any non-magical weapon it strikes and cleaves through magical barriers.

legendary.name: Lifedebt Coin
legendary.description: A gold coin stamped on both sides with the same face. When flipped with intent, the coin decides who lives and who dies.

legendary.name: Veilborn Blade
legendary.description: A slender obsidian sword that exists partially outside the material plane. It strikes incorporeal creatures as if they were solid.

mundane: Pockets picked clean. A few coins and dust.
Nothing worth keeping. You take it anyway.
The dead surrender what little they had.
Scraps. The world does not reward the weak.
uncommon: Something glints beneath the bloodstain. You reach in.
One of them was carrying something you did not expect.
The weight in your hand is unfamiliar. Promising.
Not valuable. But not nothing. Never nothing.
rare: The air around the corpse hums with faint energy.
This did not belong to a common soldier.
Someone paid dearly for this. Now it is yours.
Your fingers tighten. Something old and patient stirs.
very_rare: The ground trembles. Something here does not belong in mortal hands.
You feel it before you see it — a gravity that should not exist.
The others go still. They sense it too.
Power does not announce itself. But this one does.
legendary: A weight settles on your soul before your hand touches it.
The world goes quiet. Everything narrows to this single point.
You will not be the same person who puts this down.
It was waiting. For how long, you will never know.
